_comment: ECU compute profiles for the ADAS pipeline viewer. Each profile can override stage processing delays, global bandwidth, and thread-pool size. Load via 'Load profile overrides' in the Simulator Controls panel.

profiles.label: Nominal
profiles._note: Baseline operation. All sensors active, default BW budget, default thread pool.

profiles.label: BW Congested (35% limit)
profiles._note: Global ingress budget cut to 35%. Cameras will be throttled waiting for BW window. Expect heavy BW-throttle events on all camera lanes.

profiles.label: BW Critical (12% limit)
profiles._note: Severe BW starvation — only 12% of nominal budget available. Nearly every camera frame will be throttled, causing visible stall gaps in the timeline.

profiles.label: Overloaded ECU (4x delay, 2 threads)
profiles._note: Normal sensor delivery but ECU is 4x slower with only 2 worker threads. Processing queue backs up — expect frame drops as queue capacity is exhausted.

profiles.label: Worst Case (BW + ECU stress)
profiles._note: Combined stress: BW reduced to 20% causing heavy throttle AND ECU 2.5x slower with 2 threads causing queue saturation. Expect both BW-throttle events and frame drops.

profiles.label: Performance (fast ECU, full BW)
profiles._note: High-compute profile: ECU stages run 35% faster, BW budget 50% higher, 12 worker threads. Low latency, near-zero throttle, minimal drops.

profiles.label: RT Boost (very fast ECU)
profiles._note: Aggressive real-time boost. ECU delays reduced by 55%, BW budget +80%, 16 workers. Intended to reduce missed cycles under skip-if-active mode.

profiles.label: RT Extreme (max throughput)
profiles._note: Maximum performance profile. ECU delays reduced by 65%, BW budget +120%, 24 workers. Use for stress-testing low-latency and minimizing cycle misses.

profiles.label: Zero Miss (Guaranteed)
profiles._note: Guaranteed-style profile for near-zero missed cycles in Skip new if active mode. Aggressively reduces ECU delay, increases BW and threads, and lowers loop rate to 35 Hz for deterministic headroom.
